Container.Name: telev8-web
Container.Overview: telev8 marketing site — static-exported Next.js served by nginx behind a Cloudflare Tunnel. Container always listens on port 80 internally; map any free host port to it via the WebUI Port variable below.
Container.Description:
telev8 marketing site. Static-exported Next.js served by nginx alpine. Designed to sit behind a Cloudflare Tunnel — no TLS at the origin, host port is plain HTTP.
Internal container port is fixed at 80. Change the WebUI Port variable below to map any free host port to it.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to nginx (port 80 inside the container). Change this if 8080 is taken on your Unraid host. Then point your Cloudflare Tunnel ingress to http://[unraid-ip]:[this-port].
